tests.title: Resume a previous chat session and verify history loads
preconditions: User has a previous chat session with at least 5 messages
steps: Click on a past session from the history list
Scroll through the chat window to the top
tests.expected_result: The chat window displays all 5 previous messages in their original chronological order

tests.title: Verify AI response coherence in a resumed session
preconditions: User has a previous chat session about 'vacation planning'
steps: Type 'What was the first destination we discussed?' in the chat box
tests.expected_result: The AI response identifies the specific destination mentioned in the earlier part of the conversation

tests.title: Start a new chat session independently
steps: Click the button to start a brand-new chat
View the list of past sessions
tests.expected_result: A new chat window opens with no messages, and the previous session remains visible in the history sidebar

tests.title: Attempt to resume a session when no history exists
preconditions: User account has zero previous chat sessions
steps: Navigate to the past sessions selection area
tests.expected_result: The interface displays a message that no history is available and no session links are present to select

tests.title: Resume a session that is exactly 30 days old
preconditions: User has a chat session where the last message was sent 30 days ago
steps: Select the 30-day-old session from the list
Type a message and click send
tests.expected_result: The chat window displays the previous history and the new message is visible in the conversation thread

notes:
Assumes a 'Past Sessions' or history list exists in the UI as implied by the ability to select sessions.

INPUT WARNINGS:
  • [input-guard:weak_context] Context package has 0 item(s) (minimum 1 for enriched mode to add value). Results may not differ from baseline generation.
